message:
chore: bump to 0.2.1 and refresh agent baselines

v0.2.0 release CI failed because:
- workspace_failure_replay tests still expected the legacy
  "Merge conflict markers detected" message string; preflight now
  emits "conflict marker(s)". Locally these were updated in time, so a
  fresh tag from current HEAD picks up the fixes and produces clean
  reliability gates.
- agent_baseline/examples/version.json was pinned at 0.1.45 and gated the
  e2e_schema baseline test; regenerated via UPDATE_AGENT_BASELINE=1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
